CREATE TABLE #DecryptedData
(
	[ObjectId] [uniqueidentifier] NOT NULL,
	[ColumnNumber] [int] NOT NULL,
	[ObjectTypeCode] [int] NOT NULL,
	[Value] [varbinary](max) NULL,
	CONSTRAINT [PrimaryKey_DecryptedData] PRIMARY KEY CLUSTERED
	(
		[ObjectId],
		[ObjectTypeCode],
		[ColumnNumber]
	)
)

IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#DecryptedData') IS NOT NULL
	DROP TABLE #DecryptedData

UPDATE {0}
	SET {1} = ENCRYPTBYKEY(Key_GUID('[CrmSymmetricKey1]'), dd.Value, 1, CONVERT(varbinary(16), {2}))
	FROM {0} t INNER JOIN #DecryptedData dd 
		ON t.{2} = dd.ObjectId AND dd.ObjectTypeCode = @ObjectTypeCode AND dd.ColumnNumber = @ColumnNumber

select @Count = count(*) from SqlEncryptionAudit where @StartDateIntervalForCount <= CreatedOn

if (@Count < @ExecutionTimes)
